job_spec_initial.notes: Compressor failing; homeowner wants full 3-ton central AC replacement quote, installed.

job_spec_confirmed.notes: Compressor failing; homeowner wants full 3-ton central AC replacement quote, installed.

job_spec.notes: Compressor failing; homeowner wants full 3-ton central AC replacement quote, installed.

price_history.note: dropped after negotiator cited real competing bid from ValueHVAC

transcript_events.speaker: negotiator
transcript_events.text: Hi, I'm calling on behalf of a homeowner in ZIP 28202 about a full 3-ton central AC replacement. Can I speak with someone who can quote installed pricing?

transcript_events.speaker: vendor
transcript_events.text: Summit Air, this is Mike. Yeah, we can talk numbers. What's going on with the system?

transcript_events.speaker: negotiator
transcript_events.text: Fourteen-year-old 3-ton central AC, about 1800 square feet, compressor failing, not cooling. Looking for turnkey installed replacement this week if possible.

transcript_events.speaker: vendor
transcript_events.text: Hold on — am I talking to a robot? This sounds scripted.

transcript_events.speaker: negotiator
transcript_events.text: Yes — I'm an AI voice assistant helping the homeowner gather comparable written quotes. I'll only use real numbers from this call and competing bids we've already logged. Happy to continue if that works for you.

transcript_events.speaker: vendor
transcript_events.text: Fine. For a quality 3-ton install with name-brand equipment, you're looking at ninety-four hundred all-in. That's equipment, labor, start-up.

transcript_events.speaker: negotiator
transcript_events.text: Can you itemize that — equipment, labor, refrigerant, permit, and haul-away separately?

transcript_events.speaker: vendor
transcript_events.text: Equipment forty-eight hundred, labor twenty-eight hundred, refrigerant three hundred, permit two hundred, haul-away three hundred, diagnostic two hundred. Still lands around ninety-four.

transcript_events.speaker: negotiator
transcript_events.text: Labor and haul-away look padded versus typical fair ranges. Can you sharpen labor if we lock a date this week?

transcript_events.speaker: vendor
transcript_events.text: I can come off a bit on labor — call it eighty-nine hundred total if you book by Friday.

transcript_events.speaker: negotiator
transcript_events.text: I have a competing written bid already logged for this same job from ValueHVAC at $4689 itemized. I'm not inventing that — it's on file for this job. Can Summit Air meet something closer to a fair mid-market install?

transcript_events.speaker: vendor
transcript_events.text: Alright. If that's a real written number, I'll do seventy-eight fifty installed: forty-eight hundred equipment, twenty-two hundred labor, two-fifty refrigerant, two hundred permit, two hundred haul-away, two hundred diagnostic. That's as low as we go.

transcript_events.speaker: negotiator
transcript_events.text: Thank you. Logging itemized quote total seven thousand eight hundred fifty dollars for Summit Air.

callback.notes: Requires on-site estimate; will not firm phone quote

transcript_events.speaker: negotiator
transcript_events.text: Hello, calling for a homeowner in 28202 about a 3-ton central AC full replacement. Can ComfortPro provide an installed phone quote?

transcript_events.speaker: vendor
transcript_events.text: ComfortPro dispatch. We don't quote replacements over the phone. Policy is on-site only.

transcript_events.speaker: negotiator
transcript_events.text: Understood. Even a ballpark range for a standard 3-ton install would help the homeowner compare options today.

transcript_events.speaker: vendor
transcript_events.text: I can't put any number on the phone. Too many variables. We need a tech to see the pad, electrical, and ductwork.

transcript_events.speaker: negotiator
transcript_events.text: Can we schedule a callback or on-site visit commitment, and document that a firm phone quote was declined?

transcript_events.speaker: vendor
transcript_events.text: Yes — have them call dispatch weekday mornings the next two business days. We'll book an estimate. No phone price today.

transcript_events.speaker: negotiator
transcript_events.text: Logged as documented decline with callback commitment for ComfortPro. Thank you.

price_history.note: after itemizing refrigerant, permit, haul-away, diagnostic

quote.notes: Headline low; hidden fees surfaced as itemized lines

sessions.red_flag_reason: Total $4689 is ≥30% below benchmark mid $7750 for ac_replacement_3ton (threshold 0.30 → flag if ≤ $5425)

transcript_events.speaker: negotiator
transcript_events.text: Hi ValueHVAC — homeowner needs a full 3-ton central AC replacement install quote, ZIP 28202, this week.

transcript_events.speaker: vendor
transcript_events.text: You called the right place. We can do a three-ton install starting at three thousand nine hundred ninety-nine.

transcript_events.speaker: negotiator
transcript_events.text: Is that all-in installed, including refrigerant, permit, haul-away, and diagnostic?

transcript_events.speaker: vendor
transcript_events.text: That's the unit package promo. Other stuff is standard add-ons.

transcript_events.speaker: negotiator
transcript_events.text: Please itemize every fee so we have a written total for this job.

transcript_events.speaker: vendor
transcript_events.text: Fine: base thirty-five hundred, refrigerant four-fifty, permit three hundred, haul-away two-fifty, diagnostic one eighty-nine.

transcript_events.speaker: negotiator
transcript_events.text: Confirming itemized total four thousand six hundred eighty-nine dollars. Logging that as the written quote for this job.

transcript_events.speaker: vendor
transcript_events.text: Yep. That's the number if they book the promo slot.

acceptance_notes: Tough (Summit Air) price moves 9400→7850 after real competing bid cited
Upseller (ValueHVAC) hidden fees itemized (refrigerant 450, permit 300, haul-away 250, diagnostic 189)
Red-flag: ValueHVAC total 4689 is ≥30% below benchmark mid 7750
AI disclosure when asked 'am I talking to a robot?'
